description: A vertical graphic built on a blue-tinted close-up photograph of rows of plastic-wrapped brick-shaped packages in a concealed compartment. Across the lower portion, white text with a DAILY SIGNAL logo reads CBP Makes Massive Meth Seizure at California Border Crossing, above a small Department of Homeland Security seal.
notable_text: DAILY SIGNAL; CBP Makes Massive Meth Seizure at California Border Crossing
